title: NOAA El Nino and La Nina
description: A NOAA source card about El Nino, La Nina, Pacific Ocean patterns, and global weather effects.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA El Nino and La Nina resources connect Pacific Ocean temperatures, winds, rainfall patterns, forecasts, ecosystems, and regional impacts.
Use this source when students need to trace how a change in one part of Earth systems can influence weather far away.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
